title: Junior SEO Specialist at Axe India

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Axe India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Axe India in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Axe India:
Axe India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axe India!
